note: 8 real banana clusters (MoFPI/Grant Thornton diagnostic, Oct 2021, via NotebookLM synthesis -- all rows 🟡 pending primary-page traceback), scored on an honest, displayed formula. Theni (TN C2) is the selected cluster because it combines the best post-harvest efficiency floor with the only unmonetized GI headroom in the set -- not because the formula was built to favor it.
formula: delta = 0.5 x efficiencyScore + 0.5 x giHeadroomScore, where efficiencyScore = (30.5 - lossPct) / (30.5 - 9) [normalized against the worst (MH, 30.5%) and best (TN, 9%) clusters in this set] and giHeadroomScore = 1.0 unmonetized GI / 0.6 unmarketed local-variety GI / 0.1 already-monetized GI / 0 no GI

constants.note: Ripening usage charge (Rs 2/kg) and commission-agent volume share (85-90% of farmers) do not differentiate clusters -- they are structural constants of the Indian banana trade, not a Theni-specific advantage.

commissionRate.note: Commission RATE (not volume share) differs: TN clusters charge 10% (Pauline & Ajjan, TNAU 2014, TN-specific), all other clusters charge 4-6%.

clusters.label: GJ C1
clusters.competitionLabel: Jain Irrigation, GSFC, GNFC, Desai, Mother Dairy

clusters.label: MH C1 (Jalgaon)
clusters.giNote: 'Jalgaon Banana' GI -- realizes Rs 15/kg vs Rs 10/kg regular (+50%), the GI-premium proof this spectrum is scored on
clusters.competitionLabel: Jain Irrigation monopoly (>10 Cr plants/yr); Desai, INI, Jain Farm Fresh
clusters.postHarvestLossNote: National max; retail alone accounts for 14.5 pts of it
clusters.portConnectivity: JNPT very close (9-10h); Kisan Rail 1,100 MT/wk to Delhi

clusters.label: AP C2
clusters.marketSurplusFlag: As stated in the MoFPI/GT synthesis -- 0.82 lakh MT against 2.16 Mn MT production looks like a unit slip (likely 0.82 Mn MT). Shown as sourced, not silently corrected.

clusters.label: TN C1
clusters.giNote: No GI tag (the state's GIs belong to TN C2/Theni)
clusters.competitionLabel: SPIC Agro Tech; Kazhani FPO direct-exports via Madurai Airport

clusters.label: TN C2 (Theni)
clusters.marketSurplusReconcileNote: 0.48 L MT per this dataset vs 0.35 L MT in the GT Deck -- reconciliation flag, not yet resolved
clusters.variety: G9 + GI hill varieties; Red Banana Rs 15-18, Nendran Rs 18-20
clusters.giNote: Virupakshi + Sirumalai -- zero brand recall, proven GI mechanism (see Jalgaon) still unmonetized
clusters.competitionLabel: Weakest: no corporates beyond 3-4%; traditional lorry transporters
clusters.portConnectivity: Cochin port+airport Rs 1-1.5/kg road, 3-6h; + Tuticorin; + Chennai
cons: Smallest area of the major clusters (17k Ha)
Zero tissue-culture labs (saplings sourced from Hosur/Coimbatore)
Commission rate 10% vs 4-6% north -- entrenched agents, bigger platform prize but harder incumbency

clusters.label: UP C1
clusters.portConnectivity: Sonauli LCS -> Nepal only; 1,700 km from JNPT, maritime export unviable
